tasks.label: Verify build after schema fixes
tasks.command: cd /d c:/Users/Pichau/git/sites venda && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend

tasks.label: Rebuild after adding _document
tasks.command: cd /d c:/Users/Pichau/git/sites venda && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend

tasks.label: Rebuild after route type fixes
tasks.command: cd /d c:/Users/Pichau/git/sites venda && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend

tasks.label: Verify postgres availability
tasks.command: node -e "const net=require('net'); const socket=net.connect(5432,'localhost'); socket.on('connect',()=>{console.log('POSTGRES_OK'); socket.end();}); socket.on('error',(err)=>{console.log('POSTGRES_FAIL'); console.log(err.code); process.exitCode=1;});"

tasks.label: Rebuild frontend and backend
tasks.command: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend

tasks.label: Check psql client
tasks.command:
where.exe psql || echo NO_PSQL
psql --version || echo NO_PSQL_VERSION

tasks.label: Check postgres binaries
tasks.command:
where.exe pg_ctl || echo NO_PG_CTL
where.exe postgres || echo NO_POSTGRES
where.exe initdb || echo NO_INITDB
where.exe pg_isready || echo NO_PG_ISREADY

tasks.label: Check postgres install result
tasks.command:
where.exe pg_ctl || echo NO_PG_CTL
where.exe postgres || echo NO_POSTGRES
where.exe initdb || echo NO_INITDB
where.exe pg_isready || echo NO_PG_ISREADY

tasks.label: Inspect postgres install directory
tasks.command:
if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_ctl.exe" (echo FOUND) else (echo NOT_FOUND)
if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\postgres.exe" (echo FOUND_POSTGRES) else (echo NOT_FOUND_POSTGRES)

tasks.label: Locate PostgreSQL data directory
Check PostgreSQL service status
tasks.command:
sc query postgresql-x64-17 || echo SERVICE_NOT_FOUND
sc query "postgresql-x64-17" || echo SERVICE_NOT_FOUND

tasks.label: Initialize PostgreSQL data directory
tasks.command: echo postgres > C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgpass && "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\initdb.exe" -D C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgdata --username=postgres --auth-local=scram-sha-256 --auth-host=scram-sha-256 --pwfile=C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgpass

tasks.label: Initialize PostgreSQL with PowerShell
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$pw = 'postgres'; Set-Content -Path 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgpass' -Value $pw; & 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\initdb.exe' -D 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgdata' --username=postgres --auth-local=scram-sha-256 --auth-host=scram-sha-256 --pwfile='C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgpass'"

tasks.label: Check pg_config presence
tasks.command: if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_config.exe" (echo FOUND_PG_CONFIG) else (echo NO_PG_CONFIG)

tasks.label: Check short lib path existence
tasks.command:
if exist "C:\PROGRA~1\POSTGR~1\17\lib" (echo LIB_SHORT_FOUND) else (echo LIB_SHORT_MISSING)
if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\lib" (echo LIB_LONG_FOUND) else (echo LIB_LONG_MISSING)

tasks.label: Start local PostgreSQL server
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PATH = 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;' + $env:PATH; & 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\pg_ctl.exe' -D 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgdata' -l 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\backend\.pgdata\server.log' start"

tasks.label: Confirm psql executable
tasks.command: if exist "C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\psql.exe" (echo FOUND_PSQL) else (echo NO_PSQL)

tasks.label: Test PostgreSQL login and database existence
Check fitzone database existence
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PGPASSWORD='postgres'; & 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\psql.exe' -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'fitzone'""

tasks.label: Check fitzone database existence
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PGPASSWORD='postgres'; & 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin\psql.exe' -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d postgres -tAc 'SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = ''fitzone'''"

tasks.label: Apply Prisma migrations
tasks.command: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix backend run prisma:migrate

tasks.label: Clean Prisma temp artifacts
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client' -Filter '*.tmp*' | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client' | Select-Object Name"

tasks.label: Reset Prisma client binary
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Force 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client\query_engine-windows.dll.node' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client\*.tmp*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate"

tasks.label: Reset Prisma client and regenerate
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item -Force 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client\query_engine-windows.dll.node' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force 'C:\Users\Pichau\git\sites venda\node_modules\.prisma\client\*.tmp*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate"

tasks.label: Inspect node process command lines
tasks.command: wmic process where processid=25892 get Name,CommandLine && wmic process where processid=16052 get Name,CommandLine && wmic process where processid=15960 get Name,CommandLine

tasks.label: Copy Prisma engine into client folder
Identify node processes for backend and frontend
tasks.command: for %p in (6736 24772 28012 23440 24332 15960 25892 16052) do @wmic process where processid=%p get Name,CommandLine

tasks.label: Copy Prisma engine after stopping backend
Push Prisma schema with env file
tasks.command: npx prisma db push --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma --env-file backend/.env

tasks.label: Push Prisma schema with explicit env
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/fitzone?schema=public'; npx prisma db push --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma"

tasks.label: Push Prisma schema with explicit env
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:DATABASE_URL='postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/fitzone?schema=public'; npx.cmd prisma db push --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma"

tasks.label: Push Prisma schema with cmd env
tasks.command: cmd /d /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/fitzone?schema=public && npx prisma db push --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma"
